title: Daniel Sloss: X
full_description: Daniel Sloss's tenth solo show — a stunner that tackles masculinity, then builds to a devastating, frank analysis of the rape of one of his close friends by another, and the societal causes of sexual violence. Extraordinary, hilarious and ground-breaking, with strong adult themes. 'Tackling taboos has become his forte and this latest continues the trend.' ★★★★★
ai_summary: Sloss's tenth solo show — and his most controversial — opens as a show about masculinity and turns into something far more harrowing: an unflinching account of rape and the way male social codes enable it. Acclaimed as both a comedy triumph and a genuinely important piece of work.
